entities.name: A Silver Banner Line
entities.ability_text:
When it is merged into a major, the bank pays cash into the
 major’s treasury equal to the current share value of the
 major, even if no share is available. The cash is never
 part of the minor's treasury.

entities.name: B Orange Scroll Surveyors
entities.ability_text:
This minor counts all track upgrades as one tile point (in-
 cluding tiles with towns, but not cities, grand cities, or
 metropolises).

entities.name: C Golden Bell Marketplace
entities.ability_text:
At the start of each OR the president of this minor may
 choose the position in the RRs' operating order this
 un-merged minor or its owning major will run.
 This ability is exercised anew at the beginning of each OR.
 The president announces the choice before any other RR
 operates

entities.name: D Green Junction Mercantile
entities.ability_text:
When played in a city on the Map this minor's token adds
 bonus revenue to trains run to or through that city. The
 +€20 token may be placed in any city on the Map,
 except a metropolis or red zone. It must be placed during
 the lay track step. At the beginning of Train Phase 5, the
 +€20 token is removed, abd the +€40 token may be
 played in the same or different city.

entities.name: E Blue Coast Bridge Construction Company
entities.ability_text:
This minor receives a 33% discount on allcoastal/river
 (blue terrain costs) track construction costs (multiply
 total cost for construction by 0.67, and round down to the
 nearest pound). Each OR, this minor may also spend 1 ad-
 ditional tile point when laying track, as long as the point
 is expended to place a yellow tile
 in a hex that has a blue terrain cost.

entities.name: F White Peak Mountain Railway
entities.ability_text:
This minor receives a 33% discount on all mountain/rough (green
 terrain costs) track construction costs (multiply total cost
 for pounding by 0.67, and round down to the nearest
 pound). Each OR, this minor may also spend 1 additional
 tile point when laying track, as long as the point is ex-
 pended to place a yellow tile in a hex that has a green terrain cost.

entities.name: G Indigo Foundry and Iron Works
entities.ability_text:
This minor receives an extra two tile points to use during
 its lay track step in every OR.

entities.name: H Great Western Steamship Company
entities.ability_text:
This minor reduces the number of sea zones that count to-
 wards its trains' city limits. The reduction is one per OR
 during Train Phases 1 through 6, and two per OR during
 Train Phases 7 and 8.

entities.name: J Grey Locomotive Works
entities.ability_text:
This minor receives a 10% discount on the purchase
 price of all trains.

entities.name: K Vermillion Seal Couriers
entities.ability_text:
This minor receives revenue at the beginning of each OR.
 It is available in the round it is received to use when
 laying track and/or tokes.
 2: 20,3-4: 40, 5-6: 50,7-8: 60

entities.name: L Krasnaya Strela
entities.ability_text:
This minor has a marker which the RR may assign to a
 train, increasing that train's city limit and the number of
 towns it may count for revenue by one each — effectively,
 a “+1+1” increase. Revenue from the additional city and
 town add to the revenue generated by the train. E.g. a 2+2
 train runs as a 3+3, an 8+8 train runs as a 9+9, and a 4
 train runs as a 5+1.

entities.name: M Compagnie Internationale des Wagons-Lits
entities.ability_text:
This minor comes with ten Pullman cars that enhance the
 revenue of a train running on a RR.

entities.name: Ponts et Chaussées
entities.ability_text: No special abilities.

entities.name: Robert Stephenson and Company
entities.ability_text: No special abilities.

entities.name: Wien Südbahnhof
entities.ability_text: During any RR's place token step, the owner of this private may place any of the RR's station tokens on the Map for free. The token must be reachable by the given RR using the same rules as if it were paying for the token. If applicable, this free placement still incurs the extra costs of placement across sea zones.

entities.name: Barclay, Bevan, Barclay & Tritton
entities.ability_text: This private has the ability to reset the par value of one owned regional or major on the Par Vlaue section of the info board. Alternatively, put one share into custodianship, reserving the share. Or the player can prevent the movement of one RR down due to selling of shares for the remaining SR.

entities.name: Star Harbor Trading Co.
entities.ability_text: This private allows free passage for one owned RR through one port city as if the RR had a port token in the city. It will however not count as a city when calculating the city limit of the train and not pay any fees when using it.

entities.name: Central Circle Transport Co.
entities.ability_text: This private allows free passage for one owned RR through one non-port city as if the RR had a token in the city. It will however not count as a city when calculating the city limit of the train and not pay any fees when using it.

entities.name: White Cliffs Ferry
entities.ability_text: At the start of train phase 5 the owner of this private may put a port token on the extra ferry token field of Lille, allowing that RR to use Lille despite the two spots being already occupied.

entities.name: Hochberg Mining & Lumber
entities.ability_text: The owner of this private may place this private's token on the Map during the lay track step of a controlled RR and turn the private's certificate face down to indicate ownership. The token on the Map must be placed in a hex that has arough terrain (green) construction cost of at least 45. The hex may already contain track. Optionally, it may already contain one town, which this token replaces. The hex may not contain two towns, a city, a grand city, or a metropolis. Any RR controlled by this private's owner may count the token as a town when runnin a route including this hex. The token provides revenue as follows: TP 2: 10,3-4: 20,5-6: 40, 7-8: 60

entities.name: Brandt & Brandau, Engineers
entities.ability_text: This private has 4 tokens that can be used to ignore the green terrain costs of hexes when laying track. Only RRs of this player may use the hex until another RR pays the terrain cost and frees the hex of the token.

entities.name: Swift Metropolitan Line
entities.ability_text: This private has a marker that preserves one 2+2 train as a short haul/commuter line for the duration of the game. This private's ability may be exercised at that start of Train Phase 4. When used, the player designates one of their RRs to receive one unclaimed rusted 2+2 train.

entities.name: CHN Caminos de Hierro del Norte de Espana
GSWR Great Southern and Western Railway
LNWR London and North Western Railway
MZA Cia de los Ferrocarriles de Madrid a Zaragoza y Alicante
PLM CF Paris a Lyon et a la Mediterranee
RCP Companhia Real dos Caminhos de Ferro Portugueses
SFAI Societa per le Ferrovie dell'Alta Italia
SFR Societa per la strade ferrate romane
